channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Myanmar's Min Aung Hlaing takes first foreign tour as leader, with visit to India
item.description: The tour comes as Myanmar's new government tries to consolidate its political position regionally, while continuing to wage a brutal civil war.

item.title: Colombia's untapped wonder: The Mavecure Mountains
item.description: Far from Colombia's tourist hubs, the Mavecure Mountains rise from the Amazon jungle. Once off-limits during conflict, they now draw adventurous visitors.

item.title: The NTSB struggles to keep cockpit audio private as AI complicates matters
item.description: The NTSB took its docket system offline after digital images were used to reconstruct cockpit voice recordings.

item.title: Masculinity becomes a key issue in Texas Senate race as Paxton targets Talarico
item.description: After winning the GOP primary runoff, Ken Paxton attacked Democratic opponent James Talarico as 'too low-T for Texas.'
